name: clipx-skills
description: BNB Chain protocol metrics and analysis powered by ClipX private API. Menu-driven interface for protocol performance, token metrics, and chain analytics. Requires ClipX API access. BNB Chain metrics only.
catalog_note: Requires ClipX API access. BNB Chain metrics only.
review: BNB Chain protocol metrics via ClipX private API with menu-driven interface. Functional for BNB Chain analytics but limited to ClipX subscribers and single-chain scope. Conditional approval — niche utility for existing ClipX users.
